title: Bob pack
body:
Dive into a refined Minecraft experience with this modpack designed to optimize performance and enhance gameplay convenience. Whether you're a veteran builder, a redstone engineer, or a casual explorer, this pack ensures smoother gameplay and a more intuitive interface, letting you focus on what truly matters—unleashing your creativity.

Java 21 required

## Key Features:
### Performance Boost:

**Lightweight optimizations** improve FPS and reduce lag for a seamless gaming experience.

### Enhanced User Interface:

**Quality-of-life improvements** such as inventory sorters and tooltips give you greater control and information at a glance.
Customizable UI elements allow you to tailor the game to your personal playstyle.

### Streamlined Gameplay:
**Better crafting tools** and recipe displays simplify resource management.
Automatic organization features save time, making inventory and chest management effortless.


From solo adventurers to multiplayer server enthusiasts, this pack provides a stable, optimized base for any play style.
Designed with ease of use in mind, making it perfect for new players while offering valuable tools for seasoned veterans.
Transform your Minecraft sessions into a more efficient and enjoyable journey with this carefully curated modpack.

</details>

# Controls:

<details>
<summary></summary>

- ### MMB - Sort inventory
- ### F4 - toggle freelook
  
</details>
